title: Superstep 2025
description: Limited series of customized sneakers for the SuperStep retail chain. The models were designed for display spaces and customization zones in three cities: Moscow, Saint Petersburg, and Yekaterinburg. Each pair is an exclusive piece hand-painted by Street Wave artists, created to showcase the studio's capabilities and the brand's visual language.

details.task: Create a customized sneaker series to draw attention to the in-store custom zone.
details.solution: Developed unique designs with street art elements. Each pair was hand-painted.
details.result: The series was displayed in three of the brand's stores and successfully attracted shopper attention to the customization service.
